new_validator_requirements.requirement: If manifest marks validator_decision_external_required=true, validator_policy.validator_decision must not be an ambiguous internal relative path unless that file exists in the ZIP.
new_validator_requirements.fail_condition: validator_decision starts with 0_kernel/ or another relative in-bundle path and ZIP does not contain it.

new_validator_requirements.requirement: Require explicit STAGE_DAG_LEDGER_ID_MAP_v1.json or equivalent mapping for DAG short IDs to ledger full IDs.
new_validator_requirements.fail_condition: expected DAG node and expected ledger entry are matched only by inference.

new_validator_requirements.requirement: Current working baseline pointer must either reflect latest validated stage or declare lifecycle non-authoritative/stale role.
new_validator_requirements.fail_condition: pointer last_stage is older than latest validated export/baseline lock without explicit stale marker.
